channel.title: Modular on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in Modular on Nature Works

item.title: The idea of a modular forest garden
item.description:
Modular design can make designed meadow planting easier but can it do the same for a forest garden?

I’m fascinated by Benjamin Vogt’s idea of using modular design for a native garden meadow. http://localhost:1313/blog/modular-forest-garden/
